case_title: JANET STANFORD VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SHERIFF'S DEPT. et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO ORDER GRANTING PLTFF TO FURNISH SECURITY FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD, JANET
ORDER DISMISSING ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF ANDREW M. GSCHWIND IN SUPPORT MOTION TO REQUIRE PLTF OR FURNISH SECURITY FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SHERIFF'S DEPT.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING DEFT'S MOTION TO REQUIRE PLTF TO FURNISH SECURITY AND FOR ENTRY OF A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING NEW LITIGATION WITHOUT PRIOR AUTHORIZATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SHERIFF'S DEPT.
OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO REQUIRE PLTF TO FURNISH SECURITY FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD, JANET

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT'S MOTION TO REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.1 AND TO ENTER PRE-FILING ORDER PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.7 (REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE). NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE COURT DECLARES PLAINTIFF TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(1), (B)(2) AND (B)(3). THERE IS NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PREVAIL IN THIS LITIGATION. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FURNISH SECURITY WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 15, 2007 OR THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT ENTERS A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN PROPERIA PERSONA WITHOUT FIRST OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-15-2008 CONTINUED TO MAR-28-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Require Pl To Furnish Security Ccp 391.1 And To Enter Pre-Filing Order Pursuant To Ccp391.7, Request For Judicial Ntc In Support
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT'S MOTION To Require PLAINTIFF To Furnish Security CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.1 And To Enter Pre-Filing Order Pursuant To CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391.7 (Request For Judicial NOTICE) IS GRANTED. THE COURT DECLARES PLAINTIFF TO BE A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 391(B)(1), (B)(2) AND (B)(3). THERE IS NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT PLAINTIFF WILL PREVAIL IN THIS LITIGATION. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO FURNISH SECURITY WITH THE COURT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 15, 2007 OR THIS ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT ENTERS A PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN PROPERIA PERSONA WITHOUT FIRST OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM)
